response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate with 14+ years of full-stack experience significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. He demonstrates deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and architecture patterns, with current active involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP development)—a key role requirement. Primary gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and PostgreSQL experience, but his proven ability to master new frameworks and tools, combined with strong TDD practices and scalability background, indicates he can quickly bridge these gaps. His Staff-level seniority and teaching experience suggest excellent communication and architectural judgment.
strengths: 14+ years of full-stack mastery with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB expertise—core stack alignment
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators (re:cinq)—directly matches the AI agent development requirement
Deep architectural and scalability experience including TDD, microservices, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD practices
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned, though strong Node.js background suggests fast adoption curve
Testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned despite clear testing expertise and TDD advocacy
Missing secondary stack languages (Kotlin, Python) and primary database (PostgreSQL) experience; has equivalents (Java, MySQL, MongoDB) but not exact matches
